name: Subagent Context Isolation (Axis 2)
summary: Implemented a 3-layer isolation architecture for subagents using expert roles, logical VFS sandboxing, and role-aware token pruning (RTK).
technical_highlights: Expert Persona Registry (subagents.json) mapping roles to permissions.
SpawnManager role-injection using AA_SUBAGENT_ROLE and AA_WHITELIST.
Logical VFS Guard intercepting unauthorized path access with PermissionError.
RTK Pruning utility (rtk_prune.py) for aggressive context reduction.

impact.token_efficiency: High (up to 40% reduction for C++ code in aggressive mode)
